description: This API changes the FACTS device sending and terminal end node terminal connections. A new API, station_facts_bus_term_chng, has been introduced at 35.5 in which the node terminal connection at one end is changed by specifying the bus and desired node. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.3.0. ierr = station_facts_term_chng(name, intgar)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Quoted name of the facts device for which node terminal data for the sending and terminal end is to be changed. (input).

intgar.description: node number to which the FACTS device sending end is attached.
node number to which the FACTS device terminal end is attached.

error_codes.description: bus associated with node does not belong to substation.
Node-breaker terminal connection table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
